title: Viakal Limescale Remover Spray, Classic, Cleaning Products, Bathroom Cleaner Spray, 5 Litre (500 ml x 10), Toilet Cleaner Limescale Remover
features: EFFECTIVE LIMESCALE REMOVER: Viakal limescale remover spray is a highly recommended addition to your cleaning products.
COMPREHENSIVE LIMESCALE REMOVAL: This bathroom cleaner spray removes dirt and bacteria trapped in limescale, establishing it as an effective toilet limescale remover.

ANTI-DROPLET TECHNOLOGY: Viakal limescale remover not only cleans but also uses anti droplet technology to prevent water marks from reappearing, offering a long-lasting solution for your bathroom cleaning needs.
LONG LASTING SHINE: Viakal spray leaves a lasting shine on your surfaces.

VERSATILE CLEANING: Apart from being an excellent limescale remover spray, Viakal can be used on multiple surfaces in your bathroom and kitchen, making it a versatile addition to your cleaning arsenal.
description: Product Description Viakal Descaler removes hard water marks & dissolves limescale. Its formula helps avoid watermarks & prevent limescale return while respecting your surfaces. Ideal for surfaces that are exposed to water in your bathroom and kitchen. You can use it every day for a brilliant shine. Directions Spray surface with Viakal Limescale Remover Spray. Wipe with a dry or damp cloth. Rinse thoroughly with water. Tough encrustations: Leave Viakal Limescale Remover to act for up to 5 minutes and wipe off. Safety Warning This product is subject to specific safety warnings Causes serious eye irritation. Causes skin irritation.
